definitions.text: A device for transmitting conversations and other sounds in real time across distances, now often a small portable unit also capable of running software etc.
examples: Daragh's on the phone at the moment. He'll call you when he's finished.
My phone ran out of battery.

definitions.text: A person's telephone number (as a means of contact); digits.

examples: Phone me as soon as you land at the airport.
Her father told her to phone him to pick her up in case it started raining heavily.

definitions.text: A speech segment that possesses distinct physical or perceptual properties, considered as a physical event without regard to its place in the phonology of a language.
